title: A Brief History of Time: From the Big Bang to Black Holes
author: Stephen Hawking
excerpt: Hawking writes in non-technical terms about the structure, origin, development and eventual fate of the universe. He covers basic concepts like space and time, the building blocks that make up the universe, and the fundamental forces that govern it. The book became an instant bestseller, selling over 25 million copies.
whoShouldRead: Readers interested in Physics and Cosmology and Science
keyIdeas: Central thesis of A Brief History of Time: From the Big Bang to Black Holes
keyTakeaways: Understand the core argument and its implications
